daily_summary.headline: Aurora Alert and Multiple Launches Highlight March 12, 2026

top_events.title: G1 Geomagnetic Storm Alert
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm is expected on March 13, providing a good opportunity for aurora viewing at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Prepare for aurora viewing if located at high latitudes.

top_events.title: Firefly Alpha Test Flight
top_events.description: Firefly Alpha's 'Stairway to Seven' test flight marks a significant step in validating new systems before the Block II upgrade.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for updates on the test flight.

top_events.title: Long March 8A Launch
top_events.description: China's Long March 8A is set to launch with an unknown payload, showcasing its increased payload capacity.
top_events.action: Follow updates for potential mission details.

alerts.title: G1 Geomagnetic Storm Alert
alerts.message: A G1 geomagnetic storm is expected on March 13, providing a good opportunity for aurora viewing at high latitudes. Visibility is expected down to 60° latitude.
alerts.action_required: Prepare for aurora viewing if located at high latitudes. Check local weather conditions for optimal viewing.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
